title: Renew vehicle licence discs before holiday rush
description: MOTORING NEWS - With the festive season fast...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOTORING NEWS - With the festive season fast approaching, the Road Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) has called on motorists to renew their motor vehicle licence discs before finalising their travel arrangements.","html":"MOTORING NEWS - With the festive season fast approaching, the Road Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) has called on motorists to renew their motor vehicle licence discs before finalising their travel arrangements."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“A total of 1 002 771 vehicle licences discs are set to expire at the end of October. A further 1 060 382 will expire in November, while 1 112 393 will expire in December,” the RTMC said on Tuesday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The RTMC said it will be sending out SMS’s and email reminders to all motorists who are registered on the online renewal platform, reminding them to comply.","html":"The RTMC said it will be sending out SMS’s and email reminders to all motorists who are registered on the online renewal platform, reminding them to comply."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To register on this easy to use, convenient and affordable platform, motorists must log on online.natis.gov.za and follow the simple steps to upload their details.","html":"To register on this easy to use, convenient and affordable platform, motorists must log on online.natis.gov.za and follow the simple steps to upload their details."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to RTMC, the platform has proven to be most popular with vehicle owners.","html":"According to RTMC, the platform has proven to be most popular with vehicle owners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“About five million vehicle licences have been renewed on this platform since its launch in 2022. An average of 7 908 daily renewals were processed on this platform in the past seven days.","html":"“About five million vehicle licences have been renewed on this platform since its launch in 2022. An average of 7 908 daily renewals were processed on this platform in the past seven days."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Clients from major banking institutions such as Capitec, First National Bank and Nedbank have access to the platform through their banking apps,” RTMC said.","html":"“Clients from major banking institutions such as Capitec, First National Bank and Nedbank have access to the platform through their banking apps,” RTMC said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The platform now offers motorists a safe service to pay their Administrative Adjudication of Road Traffic Offences (AARTO) Enforcement Orders.","html":"The platform now offers motorists a safe service to pay their Administrative Adjudication of Road Traffic Offences (AARTO) Enforcement Orders."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This value-added service is intended to improve convenience and to enable users to save time by using a one-stop service for their vehicle licence compliance needs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A relatively new offering on the platform is the online vehicle registration and change of owners.","html":"A relatively new offering on the platform is the online vehicle registration and change of owners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This offering is directed at motor vehicle dealers who deal with bulk transactions and require a fast, secure platform register vehicles.","html":"This offering is directed at motor vehicle dealers who deal with bulk transactions and require a fast, secure platform register vehicles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"More than 10 large motor vehicle dealerships have now registered and are conducting transactions on the platform daily.","html":"More than 10 large motor vehicle dealerships have now registered and are conducting transactions on the platform daily."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A total of 120 230 change of ownership transactions were conducted on the platform from April to October 2025 with 78 239 registrations taking place in the same period. - SAnews.gov.za","html":"A total of 120 230 change of ownership transactions were conducted on the platform from April to October 2025 with 78 239 registrations taking place in the same period. - SAnews.gov.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
